exp_title: Malpighian tubule polyA RNA of Apis mellifera Forager (Colony 2)
design: Libraries were made with the NEBNext Illumina RNA-Seq library kit according to the manufacturer’s instructions. Sequencing was performed on the HiSeq 2000 (100 bp paired end).
sample_title: Malpighian tubule polyA RNA of Apis mellifera (Forager)
sample_description: Malpighian tubule gland of the Forager caste of Apis mellifera. Tissues were stored at -80C. RNA was extracted using Trizol protocl. Tissues homogenized in Trizol within 5 minutes of dissection.
center: UC Davis Department of Entomology and Nematology
